title: 命令は守らなければならない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the school store when my attention is
caught by an Umamusume standing in front of a
shelf.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Error: unable to complete current operation.
Reanalyzing current situation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The other day, Rice recommended I try the
special carrot buns from the school store.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
She requested my review of the product, so I
came to purchase the product in order to
complete this task. However...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The commodity in question is completely sold
out. It seems I failed to conduct enough prior
research on this bread.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I inquired with a store employee about the
item, I was informed that it is a very popular
product that regularly sells out quickly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In addition, I was able to verify the date of the
next shipment. The problem now is formulating a
strategy for when the time comes...
choice_data_list: Get in line right before the store opens.
Make a break for it during lunch!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Procuring the item at the time of the store's
opening is indeed most simple and logical.
Analyzing potential.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Comparing my schedule and time of shipment...
Comparison complete. I will be available to wait
in line at that time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your wise words of advice are much appreciated.
I believe this operation shall prove successful.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Analyzing probability of success with
my current capabilities.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Calculating predicted traffic based on current
information. Creating route. Predicting running
speed from latest records.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Updated calculations complete. Potential success
of operation confirmed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The effects of my most recent speed
enhancements have proved beneficial. Your wise
words of advice are much appreciated.
